### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)

### Checklist

**Code Quality**
- [ ] The change follows the project's existing code patterns and style
- [ ] Variables and functions are named clearly
- [ ] No hardcoded values that should be configurable
- [ ] Error handling is appropriate

**Testing**
- [ ] The tool still launches and attaches to the game correctly
- [ ] ESP/Aimbot/Radar features still work as expected
- [ ] The specific bug or issue has been verified as fixed

**Compatibility**
- [ ] The change does not break existing functionality for other game modes
- [ ] All existing controls and UI elements remain functional
